title: senecio vernalis subsp. sosnowskyi
intro: Senecio vernalis subsp. sosnowskyi, also known as Sosnowsky's woolly lettuce or woolly groundsel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio vernalis subsp. sosnowskyi include its potential to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
